description: Letter from Efrayim b. Ismail al-Jawhari from Alexandria, to Yosef b. Yaʿaqov Ibn ʿAwkal, Fustat. April 2, 1030 (the addressee received the letter in Rabīʿ II 421 = April/May 1030). Information about loading ships in Alexandria. Also details about the merchandise’ prices in the Maghreb. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #182) VMR
mentioned: Abū Qīr, Būṣīr, Palermo, Rosetta, al-Mahdiyya
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
